invariant_gasLimitBoundaries().custom:invariant: Gas limit boundaries The gas limit of the `SystemConfig` contract can never be lower than the hard-coded lower bound or higher than the hard-coded upper bound. The lower bound must never be higher than the upper bound.

statements.documentation:
Allows the SystemConfig contract to be the target of the invariant test
 when it is behind a proxy. Foundry calls this function under the hood to
 know the ABI to use when calling the target contract.
